description: 双色叠印独特美学。套色错位2-3px，半色调网点，粗糙纸感。
base_style_prompt: Risograph print style. Paper color (#FAF3E0), fluorescent pink (#FF6B9D), blue (#0077B6) creating overlay purple (#6B3FA0). Strict two-color overlay with 2-3px registration offset. Halftone dot patterns. Rough paper texture. Retro print aesthetic with contemporary design sensibility.
